title: The Fall of Icarus: The inevitability in shipping, but its all about averages
section_path: The Fall of Icarus: The inevitability in shipping, but its all about averages
section_path_text: The Fall of Icarus: The inevitability in shipping, but its all about averages
summary:
Main
The myth of Daedalus and Icarus tells the story of a father and a son who used wings to escape from the island of Crete. Icarus has become better-known as the flyer who fell from the sky when the wax that joined his wings was melted by the heat of the sun, despite his father's warnings. As Capesize rates are about to reach decade highs soon, it is easy for investors who follow the market to dismiss it as another short term spike.
